LightningComponentBundle.description: Displays selectable Sitetracker Map Layers on a Project record page, supports default Project Map layers, multi-field layer filters via Field Sets, and supports creating Production Work Logs from Site and Segment map features, including Segment completion path capture.

property.name: mapHeightPx
property.label: Map Height (px)
property.description: Height of the map area in pixels.

property.name: workLogFieldSetApiName
property.label: Production Work Log Field Set API Name
property.description: Optional field set on sitetracker__Production_Work_Log__c used to control which fields appear in the Create Work Log modal. Example: sitetracker__Create_Work_Logs_Form_GIS

property.name: siteDetailFieldSetApiName
property.label: Site Detail Field Set API Name
property.description: Optional field set on sitetracker__Site__c used to show Site details below the record name in the Create Work Log modal.

property.name: segmentDetailFieldSetApiName
property.label: Segment Detail Field Set API Name
property.description: Optional field set on sitetracker__Segment__c used to show Segment details below the record name in the Create Work Log modal.

property.name: layerFilterFieldSetApiName
property.label: Layer Filter Field Set API Name
property.description: Optional field set API name used for layer filters. The component will look for this field set on each selected layer's source object and use those fields as multi-select filters.
